steps.t: A line of Orc-made barricades runs from north to south in the woods between Imhûlar and Adagím.
The Orc camp of Mauthark lies to the south-east of the line of barricades you discovered.
The nearest grove of the Kintai should be Laivárth, located far to the north-east of Mauthark. The Elves there will have a strongbox in which you can …
